changelog:
Initial release of Keep Equipment!

**Features:**
- Keep armor on death (all pieces individually configurable)
- Keep hotbar items (all items or just tools/weapons)
- Keep offhand item
- Keep main inventory (3 rows)
- Keep all XP
- Keep all potion effects
- Toggle keybind (K) to enable/disable
- Death messages showing what was kept
- 15+ configuration options
- Server-side mod (clients don't need it)

**Default Behavior:**
By default, keeps everything (armor, hotbar, inventory, XP, effects) for maximum convenience. Fully configurable for balanced gameplay.

**Perfect for:**
- Preventing frustrating lava/void deaths
- Casual/creative-style gameplay
- Servers wanting reduced death penalty
- Players who value their time
